title: 要検証・睡眠時間と作業能率

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot Agnes Tachyon fast asleep while standing
perfectly upright.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Worried she might not be feeling well, I decide to
carry her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Where am I? Ah, I see. So you carried me
here.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Good grief, what a miscalculation on my part.
Umamusume though I may be, getting enough
sleep is still vital.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Yet despite writing without ceasing for rest or
sleep, the quality of my thesis didn't suffer at all.
What an important finding.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It appears as though I have slept too much now. I
must return to writing.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: But of course! What's wrong with that?
choice_data_list: You're just going to power through it?
You're just going to power through it?

Sounds like you're writing a pretty complicated
thesis.

Sounds like you're writing a pretty complicated
thesis.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: But of course! What's wrong with that?
choice_data_list: You're just going to power through it?
You're just going to power through it?

Sounds like you're writing a pretty complicated
thesis.

Sounds like you're writing a pretty complicated
thesis.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Power? Yes, of course. Intellectual stimulation far
surpasses physical limits!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Intrigued, are we? Then allow me to educate you
on how one can strengthen one's body through
knowledge. The key is...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Not at all! I am merely collating my research
findings. There just so happen to be a lot of them.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, could it be you are interested in what my
thesis is about? Ah, but of course you are! I'm
more than happy to elaborate on it. To begin...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And that's all there is. Goodness, have I been
talking for this long?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Why don't we continue this conversation at my
lab? You can see what I'm talking about for
yourself.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It's fascinating, I assure you. By rapidly
stimulating one's metabolism, it's possible to
vastly increase the amount of muscular
hypertrophy—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh? I wasn't even done with my explanation...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I politely decline Agnes Tachyon's invitation by
making a swift exit from the scene.
